calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-26-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 14, 2009 is admitted to probate. Maria Gianakos is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Continued To Jun-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
